title: Muzaffarpur Heat Wave
lead: Muzaffarpur is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.66. The city's temperature has reached critically high levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Muzaffarpur has brought the city to a standstill, with temperatures soaring and humidity at 79%. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.8 GG, indicating extremely hot conditions, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG. 
 The wind speed of 8.5 km/h is not providing much relief to the residents.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately
